author: @kingflares2
text: This is just every story mode team. Remember, Story mode means best wheels/units. The other teams I showed in prior videos are lesser. Also did a wheel less run on stream earlier. I go over what is needed. What synergizes, etc. Its pretty easy to figure out what works and what doesn't. You don't want to interfere with his gaunts recycling. Only thing I did not note is that if you are running corpo, put dreams on her, a crit dmg cov on pontos. I use Castor's Steppenwolf atm. I'll post the last of my e3, non whale pontos clears later from the stream. As I recently just got him +12, since he's pretty strong.
video_title: [Morimens] Every Viable Pontos Story Mode Team (10+ teams) and why they would work.
